narrative:
Warren City 6D (precinct in Trumbull County) has 661 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 1.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 43.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 41.9 percentage points.
